title: Front Office Manager - Speciality Restaurants - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Speciality Restaurants - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants:
Speciality Restaurants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
